title: Daily Report ETL
description: Build a scheduled ETL pipeline. Every day at 6am, fetch data from an external source (for this test: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts), transform each record to extract title + body length, save to a DailyReports table. Also expose GET /api/reports so humans can read what the job wrote.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a DailyReports table:
  source_id (number)
  title
  body_length (number)
  fetched_at_date, auto

# Your scheduled job + /api/reports endpoint here
# Use: every day at '06:00 AM': ... get data from 'https://...' ... save ...
